reviews.comment:
Es chiquita y la gente cuando hace cola no pone valisas, te mandas porque no sabes y te dicen tiene que hacer la cola. Los que esperan se enojan con vos.

(Translated by Google)
It's small, and when people wait in line, they don't put their bags in. You're the one who's in charge because you don't know how, and they tell you you have to wait in line. Those waiting get angry with you.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Giselle. Gracias por tu visita

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCLS1xaVVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un abuso el precio de los combustibles, por otra parte sepan que los clientes no somos adivinos y algun playero se comunica ladrando...Si a Ud. le parece competitivo cuando no hay competencia....Pero fíjese que en Neuquen, el valor que cobra Y
PF , es de 247,20 contra 269 de Uds.

(Translated by Google)
Fuel prices are abusive. Besides, be aware that customers aren't fortune tellers, and some beach bums communicate by barking... If it seems competitive to you when there's no competition... But look, in Neuquén, the price charged by YPF is 247.20, compared to 269 for you.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Juan. Tenes precios oficiales YPF y son los mas competitivos del mercado
